gold.title: Animated Tabs
gold.reason: Framer Motion background animation with 3D perspective tilt on active tab content — visually premium, great for feature/pricing sections.

gold.title: Expandable Tabs 1
gold.reason: Icon-driven tabs that expand/collapse with Framer Motion AnimatePresence and color-coded labels — highly distinctive and modern.

gold.title: Magnetic Tabs
gold.reason: Uses Framer Motion useSpring and useMotionValue for a physics-based magnetic indicator — unique interaction that elevates any header or feature nav.

gold.title: Pill Morph Tabs
gold.reason: Morphing pill indicator with Framer Motion layoutId — smooth, premium feel ideal for marketing site feature toggles.

gold.title: 3d Icon Tabs 1
gold.reason: Airbnb-style animated video/icon tabs with 3D selection state via Framer Motion — visually striking and memorable for landing pages.

gold.title: Discrete Tab
gold.reason: Custom SVG icons with Framer Motion AnimatePresence transitions — polished discrete tab style suitable for product showcases.

gold.title: Animated Tabs
gold.reason: Clip-path animation technique with Framer Motion gives an advanced, eye-catching active indicator unlike standard underline tabs.

gold.title: Animated Tabs
gold.reason: MotionHighlight context with parent/children mode, bounds tracking, and smooth layout transitions — highly reusable and visually impressive.

gold.title: Capsule Tabs
gold.reason: Scrollable capsule tabs with left/right navigation arrows and Framer Motion — practical and visually modern for content-rich sections.

gold.title: Animated Tabs
gold.reason: Clean Framer Motion layoutId sliding background indicator — the archetypal animated tab done correctly, production-ready.

silver.title: Vertical Tabs
silver.reason: Animated vertical tabs with service images and Framer Motion transitions — good for agency/service sections but opinionated content structure.

silver.title: Animated Tabs
silver.reason: AnimatedBackground wrapper with hover-enable option and flexible transition — solid reusable primitive but requires composition to shine.

silver.title: animated-tabs
silver.reason: Same AnimatedBackground pattern as ibelick, well-structured with context — good quality but nearly identical to another entry.

silver.title: Fade Slide Tabs
silver.reason: Fade + slide AnimatePresence content transitions — clean and functional, good default for most tab use cases.

silver.title: Hybrid Tabs
silver.reason: Icon + label tab pattern with Framer Motion — versatile for app-style navigation but not visually distinctive enough for Gold.

silver.title: Nested Tabs
silver.reason: Sub-tab support with animated transitions — useful for complex feature showcases, but nesting adds cognitive complexity.

silver.title: Sliding Tabs
silver.reason: Framer Motion sliding indicator on a clean tab bar — solid, reusable, and adaptable but not as distinctive as pill-morph or magnetic.

silver.title: Vercel Tabs
silver.reason: Vercel-inspired hover highlight with smooth background transitions — recognizable premium aesthetic, good for SaaS dashboards.

silver.title: Tabs like bookmark
silver.reason: Browser bookmark tab style with border illusion — distinctive visual metaphor, clean CSS-only implementation.

silver.title: Tabs
silver.reason: CVA-based multi-variant system (default, underline, pill, rounded, folder) — excellent utility value, clean code.

silver.title: Tabs
silver.reason: CVA multi-variant with button, line, and default styles plus size variants — high reusability and clean abstraction.

silver.title: Dorpdown Navigation
silver.reason: Multi-level dropdown nav with Framer Motion hover effects — useful for nav bars but misplaced in tabs category; functional and well-animated.

silver.title: Tabs
silver.reason: Advanced features: localStorage persistence, URL hash navigation, shared state — excellent for docs sites but visually plain.

bronze.title: Tabs
bronze.reason: Unmodified shadcn/ui primitive — the baseline every other component builds on, no visual upgrade.

bronze.title: Tabs 1
bronze.reason: Raw Base UI tabs with minimal Tailwind styling — functional but adds no visual value over a plain HTML tab.

bronze.title: Tabs [react-aria-components]
bronze.reason: React Aria wrapper with basic styling — accessibility-focused but no visual differentiation.

bronze.title: Simple Tabs with underline and bold font
bronze.reason: Minor Tailwind tweaks to shadcn tabs (underline + bold font) — barely distinguishable from the base component.

bronze.title: Tabs Component
bronze.reason: Ark UI tabs with basic dark/light styling — plain wrapper with no animation or visual enhancement.

bronze.title: Tabs
bronze.reason: Ark UI tabs, simple list with emoji content — demo-level, not production-ready for redesign work.

bronze.title: Ultra Quality Tabs
bronze.reason: Headless UI Tab.Group with rounded pill styling — name overpromises, design is standard and unremarkable.

bronze.title: Tabs 2
bronze.reason: Radio-input based tab pattern — CSS-only but visually dated and not suitable for modern website redesigns.

bronze.title: Tabs 2
bronze.reason: Radio-input tabs with basic border styling — bare functional implementation, no animation or visual distinction.

bronze.title: Theme Tabs
bronze.reason: Light/dark/system theme switcher disguised as tabs — too app-specific, not a content tab component.

bronze.title: Tabs
bronze.reason: Custom tab with tooltip support and primary/secondary variants — functional but plain, no animation.
